metadata.title: Maxwell's Equations Consistency Checker: Light Falls Out
metadata.note: CLI spine B00-B09. B00 cold open. B01 PROBLEM (slate). B02 ASK 'The ask,'. B03 CODE (ClaudeCodeBeat, real maxwell_check.py). B04 OUTPUT (Manim: wave packet at c). B05 CHANGE 'The change,'. B06 OUTPUT (Manim: two pulses superposition). B07 SUMMARY (slate). B08 NEXT STEPS 'Your turn.'. B09 ClaudeTitleOutro @NikBearBrown. SPARK-LINE LAW: every inner composer beat has its greeting.
